'''shathana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatromisia|iatromisia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatromisia|iatromisia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shathana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæthænæth|shæthænæth]] || [[word:shæthænæj|shæthænæj]] || [[word:shæthænæsh|shæthænæsh]] || [[word:shæthænæ|shæthænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathathanath|shathathanath]] || [[word:shathathanaj|shathathanaj]] || [[word:shathathanash|shathathanash]] || [[word:shathathana|shathathana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathanath|shathanath]] || [[word:shathanaj|shathanaj]] || [[word:shathanash|shathanash]] || [[word:shathana|shathana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathafnafth|shathafnafth]] || [[word:shathafnafj|shathafnafj]] || [[word:shathafnafsh|shathafnafsh]] || [[word:shathafnaf|shathafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathanatha|shathanatha]] || [[word:shathanaja|shathanaja]] || [[word:shathanasha|shathanasha]] || [[word:shathanaka|shathanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathanath|shathanath]] || [[word:shathanaj|shathanaj]] || [[word:shathanash|shathanash]] || [[word:shathana|shathana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathanathal|shathanathal]] || [[word:shathanajal|shathanajal]] || [[word:shathanashal|shathanashal]] || [[word:shathanakal|shathanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathanaathatha|shathanaathatha]] || [[word:shathanaajaja|shathanaajaja]] || [[word:shathanaashasha|shathanaashasha]] || [[word:shathanaaka|shathanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathanathan|shathanathan]] || [[word:shathanajan|shathanajan]] || [[word:shathanashan|shathanashan]] || [[word:shathanakan|shathanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathanathaoro|shathanathaoro]] || [[word:shathanajaoro|shathanajaoro]] || [[word:shathanashaoro|shathanashaoro]] || [[word:shathanakaoro|shathanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
